Miller Value Fund on MercadoLibre $MELI — key takeaways:

• **MELI is positioned as the dominant integrated commerce/fintech/logistics/ad platform in Latin America, creating a self-reinforcing ecosystem that addresses major structural gaps in banking, credit, and fulfillment.**

• With a large addressable market of over 500 million people and a GDP of approximately $5.5 trillion, Latin America's e-commerce penetration sits at around 14% compared to 27–32% in developed markets, indicating substantial room for growth.

• **Management has reported ≥30% revenue growth for 28 consecutive quarters, reflecting a robust growth trajectory with a GMV CAGR of ~26% since 2016 and significant increases in active buyers and purchase frequency exceeding 100% since 2019.**

• MELI generates ~90% of its GMV from third-party sellers, managing ~95% of marketplace deliveries, and effectively utilizing its logistics centers to fulfill ~75% of orders within 48 hours.

• The company's data from its marketplace is enhancing its fintech and advertising segments, with MELI being the region's #3 digital advertiser, holding a ~7% market share and anticipating that the ad market will more than double by 2029.

• Despite intentionally reinvesting in logistics and its credit book, which has decreased margins by approximately 5–6 percentage points, management views this as a moat-deepening strategy that will enhance long-term earnings potential (operating margin growth from 3% in 2020 to ~11% today).

• **MELI is currently trading at a forward FY27 EV/Sales multiple of ~2.0x, which the manager describes as a trough-level valuation that supports a strong conviction in the position given its market dominance and diversification.**

Dwarfed the index by nearly 8x over 13 years. That’s Nick Sleep’s Nomad Partnership 💸

The letters he left behind are filled with investment wisdom.

A few lessons that have stuck with me:

𝐒𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐄𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐜𝐬 𝐒𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐝: most companies capture scale benefits for shareholders. The great ones 𝘱𝘢𝘴𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘮 𝘵𝘰 𝘤𝘶𝘴𝘵𝘰𝘮𝘦𝘳𝘴. That’s how you build a moat that compounds. $AMZN $COST $MELI

𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐤 𝐢𝐧 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬: Sleep OBSESSED over where a business would be in 10 years, not what it would earn next quarter. The short-term crowd can’t compete with someone 𝘢𝘯𝘤𝘩𝘰𝘳𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘭𝘰𝘯𝘨 𝘳𝘶𝘯.

𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐢𝐬 𝐚 𝐟𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞: Nomad’s top positions were often 75%+ of the fund. High conviction and patience equals alpha. Over-diversification can sometimes be disguised ignorance.

𝐈𝐧𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐢𝐬 𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝: after finding a great business at a sensible price, the best move is often to do nothing. Sleep called 𝘱𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘦𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘢 𝘤𝘰𝘮𝘱𝘦𝘵𝘪𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘦 𝘢𝘥𝘷𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘨𝘦. That competitive advantage matters precisely because the investment industry equates activity with value. Constant repositioning, quarterly narratives, performative conviction. But activity is never the goal — it compounding at attractive rates, through exceptional businesses, is.

Generation Investment Management has over $30B AUM and a ~$1B stake in $MELI. Here is their latest published thesis on $MELI. It is the digital backbone of Latin America.

Founded in 1999 by Marcos Galperin, it is now the most valuable listed company in the region. The leadership transition is extremely safe and smart, with Galperin moving to Executive Chairman and veteran Ariel Szarfsztejn taking over as CEO.

Meli operates in 18 countries and dominates in Brazil, Argentina, and Mexico. It is an absolute powerhouse in logistics, shipping a massive 1.8 billion items in 2024 alone. But Meli is much more than just an online store. It uses e-commerce to pull people into its fintech app, Mercado Pago, which creates massive real-world impact.

Meli is the main income source for nearly two million families, and it gave over half of its users their very first digital payment or credit offer.

Management takes very smart, data-driven risks. They offer short-term credit to unbanked users based on shopping data instead of wild guesses, leading to the highest customer satisfaction scores in the entire banking industry.

They also care deeply about the future. All their shipping packaging is recyclable or compostable. Even though they left the SBTi climate group due to the exact same complex tracking rules that affected Amazon, Meli continues to aggressively roll out green, low-emission delivery vehicles. It is a rare company that mixes extreme ambition with smart risk management and true purpose.

Pretty simple thesis. I think a big part of why MELI is so successful is because their mission statement is financial inclusion and building an ecosystem for general quality of life improvements.

Mercado Libre presenta: Franco Colapinto Road Show Buenos Aires 2026

Franco Colapinto está listo para hacer vibrar las calles de su ciudad natal, Buenos Aires, en un histórico evento de exhibición, mientras la Fórmula 1 regresa a la Argentina.

Franco conducirá el E20 de Fórmula 1 de 2012, impulsado por un motor Renault V8, con la decoración completa del BWT Alpine Formula One Team, en las calles del barrio de Palermo el 26 de abril de 2026.

De esta manera, Franco se convertirá en el primer argentino en conducir un auto de Fórmula 1 por las calles de Buenos Aires, marcando un momento único para el automovilismo nacional y para el disfrute de los apasionados y fieles fanáticos argentinos.

Franco Colapinto, piloto del BWT Alpine Formula One Team:
“Conducir en casa un auto de Fórmula 1 será uno de los momentos más especiales de mi vida. Es mi manera de devolver, aunque sea un poco, todo el apoyo y el cariño que recibí desde muy chico, y que me impulsan cada día a seguir soñando con alcanzar todas mis metas deportivas. Cada mensaje, cada bandera y cada aliento siempre estuvieron ahí. Esto es para todos ustedes, para que disfrutemos juntos este momento tan especial”.

El evento posiciona a Buenos Aires en el mapa global de las experiencias vinculadas a la Fórmula 1, acercando a los fanáticos argentinos a una disciplina que actualmente atraviesa uno de los mayores crecimientos de su historia a nivel mundial.

Como parte de Mercado Libre presenta: Franco Colapinto Road Show Buenos Aires 2026, la Avenida del Libertador y la Avenida Sarmiento se transformarán en un circuito callejero de 2 km, donde se realizarán dos exhibiciones oficiales, que serán el gran atractivo de la jornada.

El festival del día también contará con experiencias únicas para fans e invitados, un fan forum y shows musicales, entre muchas otras actividades pensadas para el público asistente.

El Gobierno de la Ciudad de Buenos Aires acompaña institucionalmente el evento, reforzando su estrategia de posicionar a la ciudad como un polo de grandes eventos internacionales de alto impacto.

Mercado Libre, Latin America's e-commerce leader, has officially discontinued its Mercado Coin loyalty token. The company announced via its Mercado Pago wallet that the token will cease operations on April 17. Users can sell it in-app, use it as purchase credit, or let it be auto-converted to local fiat. The ERC-20 token, launched in Brazil in 2022, failed to gain significant traction as a rewards mechanism.

This move follows a broader trend of failed reward tokens in the region. Notably, Brazilian neobank Nubank shut down its similar Nucoin project in late 2024 after a 97% value collapse.

Mercado Libre is not exiting crypto, however. It has pivoted to a stablecoin strategy, having launched MeliDolar (MUSD) in August 2024. This dollar-pegged stablecoin, backed by U.S. Treasury securities, now serves as the backbone of its Meli Plus loyalty program, offering users a stable store of value and cashback. The company continues to hold over $38 million in Bitcoin and maintains crypto trading services.

🚨 Latin American E-commerce Giant Mercado Libre Shuts Down Mercado Coin, Ending Proprietary Crypto Incentive Program

Latin American e-commerce behemoth Mercado Libre has announced the discontinuation of its in-house cryptocurrency, Mercado Coin, marking the end of a nearly four-year experiment in user rewards. Effective April 17th, users will no longer be able to purchase, sell, or earn Mercado Coin through cashback, as its core functionality on the platform will cease. However, users will still have the option to sell their holdings, use them for purchases, or await automatic conversion to local fiat currency. Launched in Brazil in 2022, Mercado Coin was built on the Ethereum ERC-20 standard and was initially designed to incentivize platform consumption, managed through the Mercado Pago wallet and facilitated by exchange partner Ripio. This shutdown reflects a broader re-evaluation by major tech firms regarding the viability and long-term value of proprietary crypto assets (brand tokens). Nevertheless, Mercado Libre will continue to operate other crypto-related services, including stablecoin transfers and token trading, and holds over $38 million in Bitcoin on its balance sheet. Industry observers believe this move signals a cooling of the 'platform token' model, with more universally applicable stablecoins and infrastructure-focused products emerging as the prevailing trend.

En el segundo semestre de 2025, Mercado Libre analizó 1.084 millones de publicaciones (+67% vs el primer semestre), donde logró detectar de forma proactiva el 99% de las infracciones.

La compañía utiliza sistemas que analizan miles de variables en tiempo real con modelos de anticipación de riesgos, priorizando la prevención en lugar de reaccionar solo a denuncias.

$MELI inició 9 denuncias criminales en Brasil, México y Chile, y coordinó 6 operativos con autoridades y marcas.

Desde 2021, se incautaron más de 45 toneladas de productos falsificados.

“Hoy nuestro desafío no es reaccionar, sino anticipar. Con sistemas que analizan miles de variables en tiempo real, logramos detectar de forma proactiva el 99% de las infracciones.
